home.title: Operator console
home.intro: Operator replies use POST /internal/admin/v1/sessions/…/threads/…/reply with Bearer INTERNAL_ADMIN_TOKEN on the API (when set). See docs/FRONTEND_TZ.md.
home.threadsCardDesc: Sorted by last message; optional app_id filter

inbox.title: Chat queue
inbox.intro: Enter session_id and thread_id (from chat API headers or body). Token is INTERNAL_ADMIN_TOKEN on the API; leave empty in dev if the API has no token set.
inbox.securityHint: In production, avoid putting a long-lived admin token in the browser — XSS could leak it. Prefer BFF (the button below uses a server-side token).
inbox.bffHint: On the Next server set INTERNAL_ADMIN_TOKEN and optionally SPEKTORS_API_URL (otherwise NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is used).
inbox.bffUnavailable: BFF unavailable: INTERNAL_ADMIN_TOKEN is not set on the Next server. Use direct mode below or add variables to .env.local.
inbox.successHint: The client will see the reply after the chat syncs.
